name: update_agent_tool_sources
description: Replace an agent's `tool_sources` list — controls which RESOLVERS run (which tools are AVAILABLE). Distinct from `tool_allowlist`, which controls which tool NAMES are CALLABLE among those available. Pass a list (e.g. `['copass_retrieval']`) to set, `null` to clear back to the caller's default, or `[]` to make the agent tool-less. Common sources today: the active integration provider (third-party app tools), `copass_retrieval` (discover/interpret/search), `copass_management` (Concierge mutations — restricted to the Concierge agent itself; ignored on other agents). For wiring a freshly-OAuth'd integration into an agent, prefer `wire_integration_to_agent` — it resolves providers, unions sources, and writes the allowlist in one atomic call.

tool_sources.description: Resolver source ids. `null` reverts to caller default. `[]` makes the agent tool-less. A list sets the explicit set verbatim.
